abstract: Code review for any ASOME project PR that merges SDD spec/contract verification with traditional review. Step 1 pulls the SDD spec/design/tasks for the change referenced in the PR body and checks the diff against requirements, design decisions, and task completion (a code-level pass complementing /sdd-verify). Step 2 flags language-agnostic antipatterns (swallowed errors, god functions, magic numbers, duplicated logic). Step 3 checks design-system/shared-component compliance — flags reinvented UI primitives, raw hex/spacing values where a design token exists, and copy-pasted markup, cross-referencing a project's design-system-<project> skill when present. Plus backend and frontend convention checklists. Reports CRITICAL (blocks merge), WARNING (should fix), SUGGESTION (optional).
